name: Parker
description:
Library component. One-shot Park sender. Fires PARK_OUT once unconditionally at t=0; ends in Sent terminal. Used by gate-3587 specs to put the modeled Polecat into Parked state at the start of the trace -- mirrors a real polecat that hit a gate-blocking step before the modeled boundary.

No upstream observation; the Parker autonomously sends Park as soon as WF picks it. Real gastown's parking logic is implicit in `gt park` plus the gate-blocked detection inside the polecat's work loop; this component is the spec-side stand-in.

PARK_OUT.description: fires the Park event at the bound polecat. Tagged 'Park'.

actors.name: Parker
actors.owner: One-shot Park sender. Pending -> Sent on send.

triples.event: fires Park (modeling: polecat hits a gate-blocking step)
